commands.review_summary:
The PR removes redundant media-provider registry casts, adds display metadata for the core transcripts tool, and refreshes the OpenClawKit tool-display snapshot.

PR surface: Source +25, Other +42. Total +67 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main still has the two redundant image-tool casts and lacks TOOL_DISPLAY_CONFIG.tools.transcripts even though the transcripts runtime tool exists and scripts/tool-display.ts enforces coverage.
commands.review_followup: No repair lane is needed; the remaining action is maintainer review and exact-head check completion for a protected maintainer-labeled PR.

target.title: fix(agents): restore current guard checks
target.body:
## Summary

- remove redundant `providerRegistry` casts in `src/agents/tools/image-tool.ts`
- add missing display metadata for the `transcripts` runtime tool
- refresh the generated OpenClawKit tool-display snapshot
- restore the current-main core lint and guard lanes that were blocking changed-gate proof for #86930 and #86931

## Verification

- `git diff --check`
- `node --import tsx scripts/tool-display.ts --check`
- `node scripts/check-no-conflict-markers.mjs`
- `node scripts/check-duplicates.mjs --coverage`
- `node scripts/check-package-patches.mjs`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src/agents/tools/image-tool.ts src/agents/tool-display-config.ts`
- `codex review --base origin/main`
- Crabbox: `run_68f8288b261a`, lease `cbx_d74ceb7904cd`, `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run -label openclaw-current-guards-unblocker -shell -- "pnpm check:changed"`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: current-main `pnpm check:changed` failed first in core lint because `src/agents/tools/image-tool.ts` kept two unnecessary `providerRegistry` type assertions, then CI guard checks failed because the `transcripts` runtime tool lacked display metadata.

Real environment tested: Crabbox AWS Linux lease `cbx_d74ceb7904cd` from run `run_68f8288b261a`, with the branch overlaid on base `4ff5a6152c43427df0e87cd85be553a85f964225`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run -label openclaw-current-guards-unblocker -shell -- "pnpm check:changed"`.

Evidence after fix: `pnpm check:changed` selected `core, coreTests, apps`, completed guard checks, core/core-test typecheck, core lint with `Found 0 warnings and 0 errors`, app lint skip on non-macOS as expected, runtime guard checks, import-cycle checks, webhook/body guards, and exited 0.

Observed result after fix: changed-gate no longer fails on the image tool redundant-cast lint errors or the missing transcripts tool-display metadata.

What was not tested: no live image-provider request or live transcript capture; both changes are metadata/type-cleanup guard repairs.
target.author: vincentkoc
